<div style={{width: '100%', height: '100%', background: 'radial-gradient(ellipse 386.37% 71.55% at 20.00% 30.00%, rgba(255, 46, 98, 0.15) 0%, rgba(255, 46, 98, 0) 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse 386.37% 71.55% at 80.00% 70.00%, rgba(255, 46, 98, 0.10) 0%, rgba(255, 46, 98, 0) 50%), #230F14', backgroundBlendMode: 'overlay, overlay, overlay, overlay', backgroundImage: 'url(data:image/png;base64,)', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
    <div style={{width: '100%', height: 2017, maxWidth: 448, minHeight: 2017, background: 'rgba(35, 15, 20, 0.95)', boxShadow: '0px 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25)', overflow: 'hidden', borderLeft: '1px rgba(255, 46, 98, 0.20) solid', borderRight: '1px rgba(255, 46, 98, 0.20) solid', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
        <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingTop: 24, paddingBottom: 8, paddingLeft: 24, paddingRight: 24, justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
            <div style={{flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                    <div style={{width: 173.06, height: 28, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#FF2E62', fontSize: 20, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', textTransform: 'uppercase', lineHeight: 28, letterSpacing: 2, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>Hostel Underground</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', height: 100, position: 'relative'}}>
                    <div style={{width: 173.06, left: 0, top: 4, position: 'absolute', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                        <div style={{width: 130.61, height: 48, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#F1F5F9', fontSize: 48, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 48, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>UPCOMING</div>
                        <div style={{width: 55.02, paddingTop: 4.50, paddingBottom: 4.50, position: 'relative', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                            <div data-svg-wrapper style={{left: -5.19, top: 31.70, position: 'absolute'}}>
                                <svg width="59" height="24" viewBox="0 0 59 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                <rect y="1.00822" width="57.77" height="22.8" transform="rotate(-0.999999 0 1.00822)" fill="#FF2E62" fill-opacity="0.4"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>
                            <div style={{width: 55.02, height: 48, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#F1F5F9', fontSize: 48, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 48, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>GIGS</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{width: 48, height: 48, borderRadius: 12, outline: '2px #FF2E62 solid', outlineOffset: '-2px', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', display: 'flex'}}>
                <div data-svg-wrapper>
                    <svg width="18" height="12" viewBox="0 0 18 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                    <path d="M0 12V10H18V12H0ZM0 7V5H18V7H0ZM0 2V0H18V2H0Z" fill="#FF2E62"/>
                    </svg>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingLeft: 24, paddingRight: 24, paddingTop: 16, paddingBottom: 16, flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
            <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', overflow: 'hidden', borderBottom: '1px rgba(255, 46, 98, 0.30) solid', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 24, display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingBottom: 8, borderBottom: '4px #FF2E62 solid', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                    <div style={{flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{width: 72.38, height: 28, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#F1F5F9', fontSize: 18, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', textTransform: 'uppercase', lineHeight: 28, letterSpacing: 0.90, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>All Events</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingBottom: 8, borderBottom: '4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) solid', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                    <div style={{flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{width: 68.91, height: 28, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 18, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', textTransform: 'uppercase', lineHeight: 28, letterSpacing: 0.90, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>Live Music</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingBottom: 8, borderBottom: '4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) solid', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                    <div style={{flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{width: 50.66, height: 28, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 18, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', textTransform: 'uppercase', lineHeight: 28, letterSpacing: 0.90, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>Socials</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingBottom: 8, borderBottom: '4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) solid', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                    <div style={{flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{width: 39.38, height: 28, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 18, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', textTransform: 'uppercase', lineHeight: 28, letterSpacing: 0.90, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>Tours</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', height: 1776.78, position: 'relative'}}>
            <div style={{width: 346.13, left: 17.87, top: 21.08, position: 'absolute', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                <div style={{width: 340.01, transform: 'rotate(-1deg)', transformOrigin: 'top left', background: 'rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.50)', overflow: 'hidden', outline: '1px rgba(255, 46, 98, 0.20) solid', outlineOffset: '-1px', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                    <img style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', height: 428.34, background: 'linear-gradient(0deg, white 0%, white 100%)', backgroundBlendMode: 'saturation, normal'}} src="data:image/png;base64," />
                    <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', padding: 24, position: 'relative', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 8, display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                            <div style={{width: 140.48, height: 62.42, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#F1F5F9', fontSize: 60, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 60, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>DJ NIGHT:</div>
                            <div style={{width: 228.07, height: 63.95, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#F1F5F9', fontSize: 60, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 60, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>TECHNO PULSE</div>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingBottom: 8, justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                            <div data-svg-wrapper>
                                <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                                <path d="M7.90681 8.64191L8.7091 7.81111L6.51342 5.69078L6.46659 3.00785L5.3001 3.02821L5.35508 6.17773L7.90681 8.64191ZM6.03606 11.7667C5.22924 11.7808 4.46835 11.6409 3.75339 11.3471C3.03843 11.0533 2.41391 10.6485 1.87982 10.1327C1.34574 9.61698 0.919405 9.00697 0.600815 8.3027C0.282225 7.59843 0.115889 6.84288 0.101806 6.03606C0.0877226 5.22924 0.22759 4.46835 0.521407 3.75339C0.815224 3.03843 1.22001 2.41391 1.73577 1.87983C2.25153 1.34574 2.86154 0.919407 3.56581 0.600817C4.27008 0.282227 5.02563 0.115891 5.83245 0.101808C6.63927 0.0877245 7.40016 0.227591 8.11512 0.521409C8.83008 0.815226 9.4546 1.22001 9.98868 1.73577C10.5228 2.25153 10.9491 2.86154 11.2677 3.56581C11.5863 4.27008 11.7526 5.02563 11.7667 5.83245C11.7808 6.63927 11.6409 7.40016 11.3471 8.11512C11.0533 8.83008 10.6485 9.4546 10.1327 9.98868C9.61698 10.5228 9.00697 10.9491 8.3027 11.2677C7.59843 11.5863 6.84288 11.7526 6.03606 11.7667ZM6.0157 10.6002C7.30856 10.5776 8.4015 10.104 9.29452 9.17923C10.1875 8.25448 10.6228 7.14567 10.6002 5.85281C10.5776 4.55995 10.104 3.46701 9.17923 2.57398C8.25447 1.68096 7.14567 1.24573 5.85281 1.2683C4.55995 1.29086 3.46701 1.76452 2.57398 2.68928C1.68096 3.61403 1.24573 4.72284 1.26829 6.0157C1.29086 7.30856 1.76452 8.4015 2.68928 9.29452C3.61403 10.1875 4.72284 10.6228 6.0157 10.6002Z" fill="#FF2E62"/>
                                </svg>
                            </div>
                            <div style={{flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                                <div style={{width: 216.91, height: 19.78, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#FF2E62', fontSize: 12, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '700', textTransform: 'uppercase', lineHeight: 16, letterSpacing: 1.20, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>Basement Stage • 22:00 - Late</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingLeft: 16, borderLeft: '2px rgba(255, 46, 98, 0.50) solid', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                            <div style={{width: 262.65, height: 27.57, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 14, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 22.75, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>High-energy industrial techno set with</div>
                            <div style={{width: 226.68, height: 26.95, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 14, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 22.75, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>immersive spray paint visuals and</div>
                            <div style={{width: 260.39, height: 27.53, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 14, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 22.75, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>experimental light rigs. Bring earplugs.</div>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{left: 223.70, top: -46.08, position: 'absolute', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                            <div style={{paddingLeft: 24, paddingRight: 24, paddingTop: 8, paddingBottom: 8, transform: 'rotate(8deg)', transformOrigin: 'top left', background: '#FF2E62', boxShadow: '4px 4px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.50)', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                                <div style={{width: 50.34, height: 41.37, textAlign: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: 'white', fontSize: 30, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 36, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>RSVP</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div style={{paddingLeft: 12, paddingRight: 12, paddingTop: 4, paddingBottom: 4, left: 0.97, top: -17.64, position: 'absolute', transform: 'rotate(8deg)', transformOrigin: 'top left', background: '#FF2E62', boxShadow: '4px 4px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.50)', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                    <div style={{width: 47.57, height: 33.86, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: 'white', fontSize: 20, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 28, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>TONIGHT</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{width: 324, left: 47.70, top: 771.23, position: 'absolute', transform: 'rotate(2deg)', transformOrigin: 'top left', background: 'rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.50)', overflow: 'hidden', outline: '1px #334155 solid', outlineOffset: '-1px', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', height: 192.26, position: 'relative'}}>
                    <img style={{width: 328.12, height: 192.26, left: 0, top: 0, position: 'absolute'}} src="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAEAAAABCAYAAAAfFcSJAAAACXBIWXMAAAsTAAALEwEAmpwYAAAAAXNSR0IArs4c6QAAAARnQU1BAACxjwv8YQUAAAAOdEVYdFNvZnR3YXJlAEZpZ21hnrGWYwAAABBJREFUeAEBBQD6/wAAAAAAAAUAAWR4lTgAAAAASUVORK5CYII=" />
                    <img style={{width: 328.12, height: 192.26, left: 0, top: 0, position: 'absolute'}} src="data:image/png;base64," />
                </div>
                <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', padding: 24, position: 'relative', background: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 8, display: 'flex'}}>
                    <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{width: 184.12, height: 54.34, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#F1F5F9', fontSize: 48, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 48, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>NEON DISTRICT</div>
                        <div style={{width: 144.44, height: 52.96, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#F1F5F9', fontSize: 48, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 48, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>PUB CRAWL</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                        <div data-svg-wrapper>
                            <svg width="10" height="12" viewBox="0 0 10 12" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <path d="M4.86747 5.99265C5.18811 6.00384 5.46658 5.89926 5.70289 5.6789C5.93919 5.45854 6.06295 5.18804 6.07414 4.86741C6.08534 4.54677 5.98076 4.26829 5.7604 4.03199C5.54004 3.79568 5.26954 3.67193 4.9489 3.66073C4.62827 3.64954 4.34979 3.75412 4.11349 3.97448C3.87718 4.19484 3.75343 4.46534 3.74223 4.78597C3.73103 5.10661 3.83562 5.38508 4.05597 5.62139C4.27633 5.8577 4.54683 5.98145 4.86747 5.99265ZM4.71784 10.2775C5.94123 9.2307 6.85508 8.27278 7.45939 7.40375C8.06369 6.53473 8.37789 5.75529 8.40198 5.06543C8.43897 4.00636 8.13161 3.12739 7.47991 2.42852C6.82821 1.72966 6.01168 1.36309 5.03034 1.32882C4.04899 1.29455 3.20888 1.60327 2.51002 2.25497C1.81115 2.90667 1.44323 3.76206 1.40625 4.82114C1.38216 5.51099 1.64122 6.31045 2.18344 7.21951C2.72565 8.12857 3.57045 9.14791 4.71784 10.2775ZM4.66389 11.8224C3.14605 10.4367 2.02084 9.15947 1.28826 7.99083C0.555685 6.82219 0.206361 5.75205 0.240291 4.78042C0.291186 3.32297 0.800544 2.17825 1.76836 1.34624C2.73619 0.514232 3.83708 0.119773 5.07105 0.162864C6.30502 0.205956 7.37572 0.676248 8.28314 1.57374C9.19057 2.47123 9.61883 3.6487 9.56794 5.10615C9.53401 6.07778 9.11089 7.12094 8.29857 8.23563C7.48626 9.35032 6.2747 10.5459 4.66389 11.8224Z" fill="#CBD5E1"/>
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                            <div style={{width: 154.97, height: 21.38, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#CBD5E1', fontSize: 12, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '700', textTransform: 'uppercase', lineHeight: 16, letterSpacing: 1.20, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>Meet @ Lobby • 20:30</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingTop: 8, flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{width: 261.44, height: 32.09, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 14, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 22.75, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>4 Secret bars. 1 Massive club. Welcome</div>
                        <div style={{width: 241.70, height: 31.40, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 14, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 22.75, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>shots included. The ultimate way to</div>
                        <div style={{width: 258.86, height: 32, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 14, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 22.75, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>experience the city&apos;s hidden nightlife.</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{left: 200.82, top: -23.49, position: 'absolute', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{paddingLeft: 20, paddingRight: 20, paddingTop: 8, paddingBottom: 8, transform: 'rotate(8deg)', transformOrigin: 'top left', background: 'white', boxShadow: '4px 4px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.50)', outline: '2px #230F14 solid', outlineOffset: '-2px', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                            <div style={{width: 54.32, height: 40.11, textAlign: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#230F14', fontSize: 24, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 32, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>JOIN IN</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{width: 324.01, left: 15.64, top: 1269.93, position: 'absolute', transform: 'rotate(-2deg)', transformOrigin: 'top left', background: '#230F14', overflow: 'hidden', outline: '4px rgba(255, 46, 98, 0.40) solid', outlineOffset: '-4px', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                <img style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', height: 221.57}} src="data:image/png;base64," />
                <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', padding: 32, flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 4, display: 'flex'}}>
                    <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#FF2E62', fontSize: 60, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 60, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>OPEN MIC</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                        <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#F1F5F9', fontSize: 30, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 36, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>UNCUT &amp; ACOUSTIC</div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingTop: 12, justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                        <div data-svg-wrapper>
                            <svg width="11" height="13" viewBox="0 0 11 13" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                            <path d="M1.57312 11.9853C1.25248 11.9965 0.974007 11.8919 0.7377 11.6716C0.501393 11.4512 0.377642 11.1807 0.366445 10.8601L0.0814322 2.69837C0.0702352 2.37773 0.174817 2.09926 0.395176 1.86295C0.615536 1.62664 0.886034 1.50289 1.20667 1.4917L1.78965 1.47134L1.74893 0.305381L2.91489 0.264665L2.95561 1.43062L7.61943 1.26776L7.57872 0.101801L8.74467 0.0610845L8.78539 1.22704L9.36837 1.20668C9.689 1.19549 9.96748 1.30007 10.2038 1.52043C10.4401 1.74079 10.5638 2.01128 10.575 2.33192L10.8601 10.4936C10.8712 10.8143 10.7667 11.0927 10.5463 11.329C10.3259 11.5653 10.0554 11.6891 9.73481 11.7003L1.57312 11.9853ZM1.5324 10.8193L9.69409 10.5343L9.49051 4.70455L1.32882 4.98956L1.5324 10.8193ZM1.2881 3.82361L9.4498 3.53859L9.40908 2.37264L1.24739 2.65765L1.2881 3.82361ZM1.2881 3.82361L1.24739 2.65765L1.2881 3.82361Z" fill="#94A3B8"/>
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                            <div style={{width: 221.33, height: 23.70, justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#94A3B8', fontSize: 12, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '700', textTransform: 'uppercase', lineHeight: 16, letterSpacing: 1.20, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>Every Thursday • Rooftop Bar</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', paddingTop: 20, paddingLeft: 0.01, justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                        <div style={{justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                            <div style={{width: 41.37, height: 41.37, background: '#334155', overflow: 'hidden', borderRadius: 12, outline: '2px #230F14 solid', outlineOffset: '-2px', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                                <div data-svg-wrapper style={{position: 'relative'}}>
                                    <svg width="38" height="38" viewBox="0 0 38 38" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">
                                    <rect width="35.9921" height="35.9917" transform="translate(0 1.2561) rotate(-2)" fill="url(#pattern0_1_872)"/>
                                    <defs>
                                    <pattern id="pattern0_1_872" patternContentUnits="objectBoundingBox" width="1" height="1">
                                    <use xlink:href="#image0_1_872" transform="translate(-0.0556782 -0.0556836) scale(0.013892)"/>
                                    </pattern>
                                    <image id="image0_1_872" width="80" height="80" preserveAspectRatio="none" xlink:href="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/>
                                    </defs>
                                    </svg>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div style={{width: 41.39, height: 41.38, flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                                <div style={{width: 41.38, height: 41.38, background: '#475569', overflow: 'hidden', borderRadius: 12, outline: '2px #230F14 solid', outlineOffset: '-2px', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'flex'}}>
                                    <div data-svg-wrapper style={{position: 'relative'}}>
                                        <svg width="38" height="38" viewBox="0 0 38 38" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">
                                        <rect width="36.002" height="36.0017" transform="translate(0 1.25647) rotate(-2)" fill="url(#pattern0_1_875)"/>
                                        <defs>
                                        <pattern id="pattern0_1_875" patternContentUnits="objectBoundingBox" width="1" height="1">
                                        <use xlink:href="#image0_1_875" transform="translate(-0.0555239 -0.0555293) scale(0.0138881)"/>
                                        </pattern>
                                        <image id="image0_1_875" width="80" height="80" preserveAspectRatio="none" xlink:href="data:image/jpeg;base64,"/>
                                        </defs>
                                        </svg>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div style={{width: 41.39, height: 41.38, flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'flex-start', alignItems: 'flex-start', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                                <div style={{width: 41.38, height: 41.38, background: '#FF2E62', borderRadius: 12, outline: '2px #230F14 solid', outlineOffset: '-2px', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                                    <div style={{width: 20.54, height: 16.69, textAlign: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: 'white', fontSize: 12, fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk', fontWeight: '700', lineHeight: 16, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>+12</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div style={{paddingLeft: 16, paddingRight: 16, paddingTop: 8, paddingBottom: 8, background: 'rgba(255, 46, 98, 0.20)', outline: '1px #FF2E62 solid', outlineOffset: '-1px', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center', display: 'inline-flex'}}>
                            <div style={{width: 57.69, height: 29.96, textAlign: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', color: '#FF2E62', fontSize: 20, fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue', fontWeight: '400', lineHeight: 28, wordWrap: 'break-word'}}>PERFORM</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{alignSelf: 'stretch', height: 96}} />
    </div>
</div>

Text Styles:
// Hostel Underground
color: '#FF2E62';
 fontSize: 20;
 fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue';
 fontWeight: '400';
 textTransform: 'uppercase';
 lineHeight: 28;
 letterSpacing: 2;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'
---
// UPCOMING
color: '#F1F5F9';
 fontSize: 48;
 fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue';
 fontWeight: '400';
 lineHeight: 48;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'
---
// GIGS
color: '#F1F5F9';
 fontSize: 48;
 fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue';
 fontWeight: '400';
 lineHeight: 48;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'
---
// All Events
color: '#F1F5F9';
 fontSize: 18;
 fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue';
 fontWeight: '400';
 textTransform: 'uppercase';
 lineHeight: 28;
 letterSpacing: 0.90;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'
---
// Live Music
color: '#94A3B8';
 fontSize: 18;
 fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue';
 fontWeight: '400';
 textTransform: 'uppercase';
 lineHeight: 28;
 letterSpacing: 0.90;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'
---

 fontSize: 18;

 fontWeight: '400';
 textTransform: 'uppercase';
 lineHeight: 28;
 letterSpacing: 0.90;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'
---

 fontSize: 18;

 fontWeight: '400';

 fontSize: 12;

 fontWeight: '700';
 textTransform: 'uppercase';
 lineHeight: 16;
 letterSpacing: 1.20;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'

 fontWeight: '400';
 lineHeight: 22.75;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'

 fontSize: 14;
 fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk';
 fontWeight: '400';
 lineHeight: 22.75;

 fontSize: 14;

 fontWeight: '400';
 lineHeight: 22.75;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'

 fontSize: 30;
 fontFamily: 'Bebas Neue';
 fontWeight: '400';
 lineHeight: 36;

 fontWeight: '700';
 textTransform: 'uppercase';
 lineHeight: 16;

 wordWrap: 'break-word'

 fontSize: 14;
 fontFamily: 'Space Grotesk';
 fontWeight: '400';
 lineHeight: 22.75;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'

 fontSize: 14;

 fontWeight: '400';
 lineHeight: 22.75;
 wordWrap: 'break-word'

 fontSize: 14;

 lineHeight: 22.75;
